case_title: NICOLAS D. MORALES VS. LATASHA C. LATHEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, NICOLAS D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LATHEN, LATASHA C. THE EVIDENCE PROVIDED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-13-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LATHEN, LATASHA C.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $710.47 FILED BY MORALES, NICOLAS D. AS TO DEFENDANT LATHEN, LATASHA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
